title: Stay and I Go
lyrics: I promise you I'm not going to fall, only thing I promise myself is I'll go through it all, to feel something in this world of hell, I'm promising myself that I'll do it I promise myself I'm free from your oppression, I'm free from all you bother me Told you to move on, told you to get the fuck out the way and out my door, no matter what you say I can't believe a word, I promise myself from the beginning I can't watch you anymore, I can't look at you like something I adore, you're gone, you're done for me man I swear this is war, I'm finished with you, I promise myself I wouldn't lose and there's no way that's happening today, so get the fuck out the way, promise me We'll stay here while you go, we'll stay here while you go, we'll stay here while you go I promise me, I promise me, I'll break you, I'll fuck you, I'll find anything to do with this love, I promise me, and you'll leave me, break me, and I won't fake it with you I can't see you walking out that door, after everything we've been through, it just won't do I can't see you walking out that door, just not to see you anymore, no, no Either you stay or I'll go, cause I can't see you walk out that door, no I can't see you walk out that door Either you stay or I'll go, cause I can't see you walk out that door, cause I can't see you walk out that door Either you stay, either you stay or I'll go, cause I can't see you walk out that door I promise me, I promise me, that I will stay true to you, despite the things that move you that swore me Baby, I'm on my knees begging you, please don't keep on walking away from me, no, no, no Either you stay or I'll go, cause I can't see you walk out that door, no Either you stay or I'll go, cause I can't see you walk out that door
